title: centranthus longiflorus subsp. junceus
intro: Centranthus longiflorus subsp. junceus is a plant species belonging to the valerian family (Valerianaceae) and is commonly known as the 'campion'. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Centranthus longiflorus subsp. junceus include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
